description: This file defines the 'RefreshToken' entity class used for representing refresh token data within the authentication model. It maps the class to the 'refresh_token' table in the database and includes fields like id, user, tokenHash, expiry information, and timestamps, along with their getters and setters.

classes.name: RefreshToken
classes.description: Entity class that models a refresh token with security and validity details, associated with a user.

methods.name: RefreshToken
methods.description: Default constructor for the RefreshToken class.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the refresh token.

methods.name: getUser
methods.description: Returns the AppUser associated with this refresh token.

methods.name: getExpiresAt
methods.description: Returns the expiration timestamp of the token.

methods.name: getRevokedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the token was revoked, if applicable.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp of the token.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the unique identifier for the refresh token.

methods.name: setUser
methods.description: Associates an AppUser with this refresh token.
